title: Cheese!
body:
![Cheese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47986247fbd163283c95eb13b50f319be27a0e08_0.webp) # WELCOME TO THE CHEESE ADDON! A brief context here: I always wanted to create my own mod not modpack and this is it! I worked for about a month texturing and creating and branding this mod. So I hope you like this! ## A Showcase Of The Mod! ![more FOODS!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/059766e32ee38f6acc3ba2b19169a444b837c2c1_0.webp) - We have cheese! (ofc) ![Cheese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79004dea670dc632bb74c3b1f6047af904760801.png) - We have bread with cheese! ![cheesewbread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44ed02154f8f232bd2b6222d060de896e739ed02_0.webp) - And finally CHEESCAKE!!! ![CAKE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a541a5f5d08c7b1c4e5bf2af076df0b497c5abf9_0.webp) _But with more to come!_ ![ART???](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b206865cec86a559e15725099d82dfe7ead24eff_0.webp) - CHEESE GALLERY ![cheese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56bc629d0de81fd17bccb148ff26bba31d65d68a.png) - LOW QUAL CHEES ( Grammar mistake made purposefully! ) ![Cheese](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6440ca3732c2bc51f89160524077a64ea96d4aab.png) ![STUFF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6eb4484b7dd942d2756e0cb9960acd38ff1b3a_0.webp) - A KNIFE FOR SLICING BREAD! ![KNIFE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10173f8ea73234e9bc07bd8b2cafba77fa77b949_0.webp) - BLOCK OF CHEESE! ( I was out of ideas tbh )
Recipe's ![knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e644d558ee03950d37658315632d1f2c076dc3.png) ![bwc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75726d069e1f845892b7a0f0e01bb91d1932309a.png) ![cr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa91140ebdf118d8d3364fb6b8b23af580ea7ac8.png) ![cheescake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6a3e1d8af93175cae313d8597d2e2733a1434e3.png) ![cheese block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/373c1479b4bbd4f2f759201138f88393362ede24.png)
